title: TRIXES Pack of 3 Halloween 3D Lenticular Magic Moving Picture Frames - Changing Face Portrait Horror Decoration for Haunted Spooky Themed Parties - 38 X 25 cm
features: FANTASTIC HALLOWEEN DECORATIONS; Ideal choice of wall decor for Halloween or horror parties.. Each one features a classic portrait that morphs into a horrifying image as you change your viewing angle. It is spooky and scary to make family and friends creep out

WIDE USE; Suitable for any smooth and flat surface (interior & exterior), including smooth walls, glass walls, smooth ceramic tiles, mirrors, smooth metal and wood. Perfect for Halloween parties or a haunted house themes
PREMIUM QUALITY; Made of premium quality waterproof PVC to prevent against moisture, these 3D Halloween frames are completely waterproof, moisture-resistant, anti-rust and easy to clean
A SPOOKY SUPPRISE GIFT; These horror frames will appeal to many collectors and will be a great gift for any age. Haunted spooky design, recreates the atmosphere of mystery and horror
DIMESNIONS; Each one comprises of a 7 x 9 Inch Picture in 9 x 11 Inch PVC Plastic Frame
description: Product Description Previous page Next page TRIXES Halloween 3D Lenticular Magic Moving Picture Frames The lenticular prints are masters of illusion and are guaranteed to take your guests by surprise. Proof that nothing is ever as it seems, and a photograph can tell a thousand words. All it takes is a change of viewing angle to reveal their true monstrosity! Scare Trap At first glance these charming and elegant portraits look perfectly ordinary. They lure their admirers into a false sense of security when in fact they are really a scare trap. Catch your guests by surprise when they least expect it. True Monstrosity Seemingly normal portrait sitters are transformed into hideous beings with fangs, bulging eyes and warped facial expressions. Sinister and disturbing, you would not want to run into any of these characters in the dark! Vintage Style The vintage style rectangular shaped thick frames have a classic vintage appearance and are embellished with decorative markings. Each frame measures 38.5 cm x 25 cm.
